ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER FILED BY PETITIONER HAREL, AHUVIYA HEARING SET FOR MAY-05-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-05-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION NOT REQUIRED. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME AND GENDER ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME FROM AHUVIYA HAREL TO ISABEL ROSA ARAUJO. ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER FROM MALE TO FEMALE AND FOR ISSUANCE OF A NEW BIRTH CERTIFICATE. DECREE CHANGING NAME AND GENDER IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
DECREE CHANGING NAME AND GENDER FILED BY PETITIONER HAREL, AHUVIYA
